flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Atlanta Metropolitan State College are 12% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($33.3k vs $37.9k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Atlanta Metropolitan State College rose 38% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.2k → $14.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Atlanta Metropolitan State College fell 21% between 2006 and 2009 (11.8% → 9.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Atlanta Metropolitan State College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.2k).
